# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  inputs:
    storageAccountName: 'publicwebsitestorage'
    staticWebsiteContainerName: 'wwwroot'

variables:
  storageAccountType: Standard_LRS

outputs:
  storageAccountName:
    value: '[parameters(storageAccountName)]'
  wwwRootEndpoint:
    value: '[concat(variables('publicIpAddress'),'.azurewebsites.net')]'

parameters:
  publicIpAddress:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 'contosopublicip'

providers:
  features:
    Microsoft.Resources: '2018-05-01'
    Microsoft.Storage: '2019-06-01'
    Microsoft.Web: 'latest'

resources:
  storageAccount:
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    name: '[parameters(storageAccountName)]'
    location: eastus
    properties:
      accountType: '[variables(storageAccountType)]'
      creationTime: '[utcNow("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ")]'
      enabledForBlobPublicAccess: true
      minTLSVersion: V1_2

  staticWebsiteContainer:
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    name:
      value: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/{storageAccountName}/services/default/containers/{staticWebsiteContainerName}'
      parameter: storageAccountName staticWebsiteContainerName resourceGroupName subscriptionId
    properties:
      accessLevel: container

  staticWebsiteEndpoint:
    type: Microsoft.Web/hostingEnvironments
    apiVersion: 'latest'
    name: '[concat('webhost','_env_',parameters('publicIpAddress'))]'
    location: eastus
    properties:
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: WEBSITE_HOSTNAME
            value: '[variables(wwwRootEndpoint)]'
        cors:
          - allowedOrigins:
            - '*'
          - allowedMethods:
            - GET
          - maxAgeInSeconds: 86400
        hostNameSslStates: []
      hostingEnvironmentType: StaticSiteLinux
